title: dictamnus albus var. albiflos
intro: Dictamnus albus var. albiflos, also known as the white blooming or white flowering dictamnus, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae and is commonly referred to as the 'burning bush'. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils, which contain coumarin and other compounds with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dictamnus albus var. albiflos include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, colds, and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic for wound treatment. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal purposes.
